title: flemingia rothiana
intro: Flemingia rothiana, also known as Roth's Flemingia, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, commonly found in Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antimalarial properties. The health benefits of Flemingia rothiana include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various infections, making it a valuable herb in folk medicine. Flemingia rothiana is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, and its roots and leaves are used separately in different preparations.
